meta.title: Hermes 2.0 Audit Intelligence Stack

honesty_legend.ESTIMATE: real method but multiplies an unmeasured assumption; ship as range with assumptions visible
honesty_legend.GUESS: no measured input; never present as a number

meta.shared_google_key: ONE free Google Cloud API key covers PSI API + CrUX API + CrUX BigQuery

brain1_with_site.output: problem-list (severity + pt-BR sentence), not a vague score

tools.name: Google PageSpeed Insights API v5
tools.measures: Lighthouse score + CWV lab (LCP/INP/CLS/FCP/TBT/SI) + opportunities, 1 call

tools.name: GoogleChrome/lighthouse
tools.measures: same engine self-hosted, unlimited, custom throttle

tools.name: CrUX API
tools.cost: free 150qpm, same key; often EMPTY for low-traffic SMB

tools.name: s0md3v/wappalyzer-next
tools.cost: free GPL-3.0, Playwright VM, arms-length CLI if closed-ship

tools.name: Playwright/Patchright (Python)
tools.measures: render headless BEFORE conversion detection (else false 'no WhatsApp')

data_sources: CrUX API (field, no BR filter, empty for SMB)
CrUX BigQuery country='br' (only $0 BR-segmented field CWV, needs GCP+SQL)

ESTIMATE: freshness only as COMPOSITE (copyright year alone lies)
GUESS_DANGER: ABSENCE of WhatsApp via static HTML = false positive, ALWAYS render-then-parse
axe ~30-50% WCAG only -> say 'at least N'
CrUX absent for SMB -> never label lab as real-user
CrUX API has no Brazil filter

brain2_no_site.output: digital gap vs competitors; strongest = 'you do not exist online'

tools.name: subzeroid/instagrapi
tools.role: IG fallback if rate-limited, REQUIRES LOGIN disposable-only

tools.name: kevinzg/facebook-scraper
tools.returns: followers/about, post frequency, engagement, no API key

tools.name: ReclameAqui internal JSON API
tools.returns: reputation score, complaint counts, response/resolution rate

data_sources: GBP via Maps SERP (location='Cuiaba, State of Mato Grosso, Brazil', hl=pt, gl=br)
brain2_no_site.tos_risk: Google Maps/IG/FB forbid scraping in ToS = contract breach not crime (hiQ v LinkedIn backs public-data legality). Enforcement technical: temp IP ban 15-60min; IG account suspension = only costly risk. Mitigate: low volume, 2-5s delays, rotate UA, BR residential IP, isolate IG to throwaway. SERP APIs safest. Browser scrapers VM-only.

ESTIMATE: local-pack GRID rank point-dependent ('sampled at N points')
GUESS: claimed vs unclaimed often not exposed
Reels play counts not always exposed (gap, never fabricate)
competitor set = 'top N for query Q' never 'all'

brain3_estimate_revenue.output: revenue range (low/median/high) + confidence + assumptions; LEAD with relative-vs-competitor rank

tools.name: gosom/google-maps-scraper
tools.role: PRIMARY: review_count + per-star + review TIMESTAMPS -> review velocity = best free demand proxy

tools.name: pandas review-velocity model
tools.role: CORE IP: reviews/month x review-rate% x avg ticket -> revenue RANGE, every multiplier printed

tools.name: CNPJ porte (BrasilAPI / ReceitaWS / minhareceita)
tools.role: legal revenue CEILING band (MEI<=81k, ME<=360k, EPP<=4.8M/yr) - FACT but coarse

tools.name: SEBRAE / IBGE sector benchmarks
tools.role: sector-level ticket/margin as documented assumption band (NOT firm-specific)

brain3_estimate_revenue.proxy_model: reviews/month (FACT) x review-rate assumption ~1-5% (NOT measured) -> customers/month x category avg ticket BRL (assumed) -> revenue RANGE; cross-check ceiling vs CNPJ porte

ESTIMATE_~30_40pct_absolute: absolute BRL = product of 2 guesses (review-rate% + avg ticket); Luca/HBS supports correlation+star->revenue 5-9% but NO absolute BRL formula
RELATIVE_~70pct: bottom-quartile review velocity; 1/5 reviews of category leader = LEAD WITH THIS
GUESS_FORBIDDEN: any single point figure e.g. 'voce fatura R$45k/mes'

brain3_estimate_revenue.anti_snakeoil_rule: ship transparent range with multipliers exposed; anchor on relative-vs-competitor + CNPJ band; tell owner no free source gives true revenue

brain4_project_uplift.output: min-median-max scenarios per intervention with premises visible; conservative headline

tools.name: Michael Luca (HBS) 'Reviews, Reputation, and Revenue: The Case of Yelp.com'
tools.role: ONLY empirical anchor: +1 star ~= +5-9% revenue (US restaurants - extrapolation to BR multi-sector, declare it)

tools.name: pandas scenario engine
tools.role: min/median/max from measured inputs + parameterized premises, every number traceable

tools.name: Google PageSpeed Insights API
tools.role: mobile perf delta (current vs potential) = quantified input for 'fix mobile' projection

tools.name: CrUX BigQuery country='br'
tools.role: only $0 BR-segmented CWV benchmark to anchor mobile impact with real BR data

tools.name: Serper.dev
tools.role: local-pack rank target+competitors -> 'rank up = +N views/mo' input

GUESS_FORBIDDEN: 'site novo = +R$Z faturamento' with zero measured business input

brain4_project_uplift.golden_rule: never a single cravado number; always range + premise ('assuming ticket R$X and 3% conversion')
brain4_project_uplift.ethics_br: CDC forbids guaranteed-result/misleading claims; frame as 'estimated potential'; document assumptions; default to CONSERVATIVE scenario for headline
brain4_project_uplift.weakest_link: no $0 BR-specific ticket/conversion-by-sector source -> SEBRAE/IBGE benchmark, ask prospect, or editable input

feeds.geronimo_sales: problem_list + gap_summary + relative_rank + conservative uplift -> personalized pt-BR opener
feeds.vuecra_site: brain1 problem_list + brain2 gaps -> brief for what new site/presence must fix (closes loop)

open_decisions: single-prospect on-demand vs batch lead-gen (batch raises ToS risk + burns SERP tiers)
output format: JSON only vs client-facing PDF/heatmap
GPL contamination: wappalyzer-next + trafilatura GPL -> arms-length CLI if closed-ship
revenue/uplift posture: ranges-only (research-backed) vs single number (snake-oil); conservative vs optimistic default
ticket+conversion by sector: SEBRAE/IBGE benchmark vs ask-prospect vs editable
IG fallback: disposable throwaway vs strictly anonymous-only
BR residential IP/proxy for VM vs existing VM IP
Google Cloud key: exists? who provisions? (only external account whole stack needs)
research_gaps: roi-projection (brain4) under-researched - no dedicated thread, only Luca anchor + borrowed inputs; CTR curves + BR sector ticket/conversion need own pass
revenue calibration: no ground-truth; track 5-10 prospects to calibrate multipliers above guess-level
CrUX BigQuery country=br worth GCP+SQL setup vs lab-only?
CNPJ porte = legal ceiling band NOT actual revenue - don't overstate precision
